attractions.name: Mekong Delta
attractions.description: Vietnam's Rice Bowl, famous for its vast network of rivers, orchards, and traditional villages where life revolves around the water

attractions.name: Vinh Trang Pagoda
attractions.description: Beautiful temple dating back to the late 19th century known for its unique architecture that blends Vietnamese, Chinese, and European influences

attractions.name: Mekong Delta Islands
attractions.description: Four beautiful islands known as Dragon, Unicorn, Phoenix and Tortoise islands with fruit plantations
